fullText: come on come on i only changed one dimension why is Looker continuous integration retesting the entire model i need to get this change pushed hey hey hey don't blame me by default I'm a perfectionist and want to test your whole model but we can definitely change the configuration to speed this up hey Lucer CI we already have a team plan to work on older errors for the whole model this is just for a simple update then you need incremental validation it's a specialized method for isolating errors that are unique to your development branch it ignores existing errors in production so you can focus strictly on the ones you're responsible for it makes validation much faster especially in large projects with hundreds of explores that's exactly what I need is that the same as targeting an explore not quite incremental validation is about air isolation between branches targeting explores is about scope to target specific explores specify the model name then a forward slash and then the name of the explores if you want to exclude an explore maybe because it's large or someone else is working on testing it use the same formatting in the explores to exclude configuration option okay incremental validation to isolate my specific changes and targeting the explore I'm working on to fix older errors because I know I'm responsible for some of those now you're focused no more distractions just pushing clean code finished
